# MTBF Report Generation Instructions

> ⚠️ This document is a placeholder. Agent instructions have not yet been written.

## Purpose

Provide Copilot with instructions for generating a Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) report for a hardware design.

## What this file should cover

- Input data required (BOM, operating conditions, environment)
- Applicable standards (MIL-HDBK-217, Telcordia SR-332)
- Expected output format
